mnemonics: UNARY is like a solo dance, U for Unique, N for Not, A for All, R for Return Only
BINARY is like a partner dance, B for Both Tables, I for Intersection, N for Not, A for And, R for Return
keyPoints: Unary Operations: Projection (σ), Selection (π), Union (∪), Difference (-), and Difference with a Condition (σ cond)
Binary Operations: Intersection (∩), Union (∪), Cartesian Product (×), and Join (∈)
Aggregate Operations: Sum (∑), Average (AVG), Maximum (MAX), Minimum (MIN), and Count (COUNT)
Grouping Operations: Group By (GROUP BY), Aggregate on a Group (AGGREGATE ON), and HAVING (HAVING)
Examples of Queries in Relational Algebra: Sigma Pi Sigma (σπσ), Union of Selections (σ ∪ σ), Intersection of Selections (σ ∩ σ)
